items.label: Text block
items.description: Markdown copy, briefing notes, and section headers.

events.name: click
events.label: Click
events.description: Runs configured click actions.

default_props.content:
### New section
Add context for this workspace.

items.label: Metric
items.description: Metric card with grouped variable-backed values, numeric formatting, and conditional formatting.

input_variables.label: Metric variables
input_variables.description: String, numeric, URL/runtime, aggregation, or function-backed variables displayed in the card.

items.label: Table
items.description: Paginated records from query, dataset, or object set bindings.

input_variables.label: Rows
input_variables.description: Rows from a query, dataset, ontology object set, or binding.

output_variables.label: Selected row
output_variables.description: The row selected by the user.

events.name: row_select
events.label: Row select
events.description: Runs when a row becomes selected.

items.label: Object table
items.description: Object-set table with selected object output.

output_variables.label: Active object
output_variables.description: Highlighted row published as an active object variable.

output_variables.label: Selected objects
output_variables.description: Selected objects published as an object set variable.

events.name: select
events.label: Active object selection
events.description: Runs after the active row changes.

events.name: selection_change
events.label: Selection change
events.description: Runs after row selection changes.

events.name: row_action
events.label: Row action
events.description: Runs when a configured row action fires.

items.label: Filter list
items.description: Filter controls backed by object set filter variables.

input_variables.label: Object set
input_variables.description: Object set whose properties can be filtered.

output_variables.label: Object-set filters
output_variables.description: Object-set filter variable emitted by the widget.

events.name: filter_change
events.label: Filter change
events.description: Runs after filter values change.

items.label: Property list
items.description: Selected-object property display.

input_variables.label: Input object set
input_variables.description: Object set whose first object is displayed.

items.label: Object set title
items.description: Object set count or single-object title with object type icon and empty-state behavior.

input_variables.label: Object set
input_variables.description: Object set summarized by the title.

items.label: Chart
items.description: Line, bar, area, pie, or scatter visualizations.

input_variables.label: Chart data
input_variables.description: Tabular data used to compute the chart series.

output_variables.label: Selected points
output_variables.description: Selected chart marks or source rows.

events.name: mark_select
events.label: Mark select
events.description: Runs when a chart mark is selected.

items.label: XY chart
items.description: Object-aware XY chart.

input_variables.label: Object set
input_variables.description: Object set plotted on the chart.

output_variables.label: Selection filter
output_variables.description: Object set filter variable produced by selected chart categories.

output_variables.label: Selected objects
output_variables.description: Objects selected by chart interaction.

events.name: mark_select
events.label: Mark select
events.description: Runs when a chart mark is selected.

items.label: Pie chart
items.description: Object-aware pie chart.

input_variables.label: Object set
input_variables.description: Object set aggregated into pie slices.

output_variables.label: Selected slice filter
output_variables.description: Filter implied by a selected pie slice.

events.name: slice_select
events.label: Slice select
events.description: Runs when a pie slice is selected.

items.label: Free-form Analysis
items.description: Runtime analysis path for exploring a bounded input object set with filters, tables, metrics, charts, and notes.

input_variables.label: Input object set
input_variables.description: The bounded object set users can explore in the runtime widget.

output_variables.label: Output object set
output_variables.description: The filtered object set emitted by the current analysis path.

events.name: output_change
events.label: Output object set changed
events.description: Runs when filters or search change the output object set.

default_props.empty_state_description: Add filters, metrics, tables, charts, and notes against this app-bounded object set.

items.label: Scenario controls
items.description: What-if parameters that feed runtime bindings, scenario variables, charts, tables, and action forms.

output_variables.label: Scenario values
output_variables.description: Current what-if parameter values.

events.name: scenario_change
events.label: Apply scenario
events.description: Runs when scenario values are applied. Payload includes values, baseline, deltas, and changed parameter names.

events.name: scenario_reset
events.label: Reset scenario
events.description: Runs when scenario values are reset to baseline.

items.label: Embedded agent
items.description: Prompt box backed by an OpenFoundry agent.

input_variables.label: Agent context
input_variables.description: Optional variable context sent with the prompt.

output_variables.label: Agent response
output_variables.description: Latest response returned by the embedded agent.

events.name: submit
events.label: Submit
events.description: Runs when a prompt is submitted.

default_props.welcome_message: Ask the embedded agent for help.

items.label: Action button
items.description: Trigger navigation, links, filters, or workflow actions.

input_variables.label: Action context
input_variables.description: Optional context passed to button actions.

events.name: click
events.label: Click
events.description: Runs when the button is clicked.

items.label: Button group
items.description: Trigger one or more Workshop actions.

input_variables.label: Action context
input_variables.description: Optional context passed to group actions.

output_variables.label: Last action
output_variables.description: Identifier of the most recent button action.

events.name: button_click
events.label: Button click
events.description: Runs when a button in the group is clicked.

items.label: Map
items.description: MapLibre object, overlay, and template layers with points, lines, polygons, selection, shape drawing, and tooltips.

input_variables.label: Layer data
input_variables.description: Object sets, queries, datasets, or saved geospatial layers rendered on the map.

output_variables.label: Active object
output_variables.description: Object currently clicked or focused on the map.

output_variables.label: Selected objects
output_variables.description: Map-selected objects as an object set variable.

output_variables.label: Drawn shape
output_variables.description: GeoJSON shape drawn by the user.

output_variables.label: Shape search results
output_variables.description: Objects intersecting the drawn shape.

output_variables.label: Selected time
output_variables.description: Bidirectional timestamp cursor on the timeline panel.

output_variables.label: Playback position
output_variables.description: Current playback time as milliseconds since epoch.

events.name: object_select
events.label: Object select
events.description: Runs when a map feature is selected.

events.name: shape_change
events.label: Shape change
events.description: Runs when a drawn shape changes.

events.name: time_change
events.label: Time change
events.description: Runs when the timeline cursor or playback position changes.

items.label: Timeline
items.description: Visualize temporal data, rendering objects as chronologically ordered events. Supports multiple layers, vertical or horizontal orientation, and selection output.

input_variables.label: Object set
input_variables.description: Primary object set whose objects are rendered as timeline events.

output_variables.label: Active object
output_variables.description: Currently selected timeline event as an object set of one.

output_variables.label: Selection filter
output_variables.description: Object set filter variable produced by event selection.

events.name: event_select
events.label: Event select
events.description: Runs when an event on the timeline is selected.

items.label: Vertex Graph
items.description: Embed a saved Vertex graph, graph template, or diagram inside the Workshop module. Selection sync is user→Workshop via `selected_objects`; Workshop can refocus the graph via `zoom_to`.

input_variables.label: Zoom to object set
input_variables.description: Object set the embedded graph should focus the viewport on. Workshop→graph is one-directional: the graph cannot reverse-select Workshop variables.

input_variables.label: Add objects to subgraph
input_variables.description: Programmatically append objects to the embedded graph's current subgraph.

output_variables.label: Selected objects
output_variables.description: Auto-populated when the user selects one or more nodes in the embedded graph.

output_variables.label: Objects on subgraph
output_variables.description: All objects currently rendered on the active subgraph.

events.name: selected_objects_change
events.label: Selected objects change
events.description: Runs when the embedded graph selection changes.

events.name: successful_action_application
events.label: Successful action application
events.description: Runs after an action invoked from inside the embedded graph succeeds.

default_props.incomplete_inputs_message: Pick a saved Vertex graph in the inspector to render.

items.label: Embedded module
items.description: Embed another published Workshop module and bind its module-interface variables to parent variables. Mapped variables share state in both directions; the parent's variable definition is authoritative and the child's default is ignored.

module_slug.description: Slug of the published child module to embed.

module_rid.description: Optional resource id alias for the child module; takes precedence over module_slug when both are provided.

mapping.description: Maps child interface external ids to parent value sources. Keys are child external_ids.

lazy_load.description: Defer mounting the child until the embed scrolls into the viewport. Defaults to true.

items.label: Container
items.description: Grouped nested widget section for composite layouts.
